docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DESYATNIK, NATALIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF YEHONATAH AFEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATALIE DESYATNIK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY AFEK, YEHONATAH AS TO DEFENDANT DESYATNIK, NATALIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED JUN-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DESYATNIK, NATALIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AFEK, YEHONATAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESYATNIK, NATALIE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY AFEK, YEHONATAH DESYATNIK, NATALIE
